raw_responses.title: Boosting LLMs with Mask Fine-Tuning (2503.22764)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: MFT learns and applies BINARY MASKS to optimized models; carefully breaks structural integrity to improve performance without updating weights; +2.70/+4.15 IFEval LLaMA2-7B/3.1-8B.

raw_responses.title: Structured Sparsity Dual Lottery Tickets Continual Multi-task
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: LoTA (Lottery Ticket Adaptation) identifies sparse subnetworks for multi-task; LoTTO learns mutually sparse masks to prevent overlap between sequential tasks — EXACT batik-style protection.
